query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view of a narrow urban alley between multi-story buildings. A streetlamp mounted on the far wall illuminates the center of the scene, casting shadows across the paved road. On the left sidewalk, a circular traffic sign mounted on a pole displays a red border with a black arrow indicating no right turns. White painted arrows on the asphalt point in different directions. On the right side, a covered scooter sits near a doorway beside a storefront with closed metal shutters. The buildings feature rectangular windows with grid panes, and a dark trash bag rests on the sidewalk near the corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime view of a narrow urban alley between multi-story buildings, dominated by a sickly yellow-orange sodium vapor glow from a central streetlamp that casts deep shadows across the pavement. The pervasive unhealthy tint washes over walls and road surfaces, while the empty scene—with its no-right-turn sign, covered scooter, closed storefront shutters, and dark trash bag—evokes an atmosphere of isolation and unease.
